title: eriogonum cernuum subsp. rotundifolium
intro: Eriogonum cernuum subsp. rotundifolium, also known as the bottlebrush buckwheat or cushion buckwheat, is a perennial plant that belongs to the buckwheat family (Polygonaceae). Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to reduce inflammation and act as a diuretic. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as lowering blood pressure and reducing the risk of cardiovascular disease due to its high concentration of flavonoids and other antioxidants. Eriogonum cernuum subsp. rotundifolium can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, infusions, and salves, making it a popular ingredient in herbal medicine.
